title: Spotty's Pandamations
description: A simple resource pack that retextures some items into an animated panda theme
body:
Hi there!

Spott's Pandamations is an animated resource pack that aims to retexture items, and hopefully more in the future, into panda-themed animations.

The only things with their textures made and animated are the Swords, Axes, pickaxes, and the Totem of Undying.

I hope you enjoy,
Spotty
